ticket.subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.raw_subject: Welcome to Shopify Partner PluginHive! We’re here to help you save both time and money
ticket.description:
Hello Thomas,

 Greeting from Shopify Partner PluginHive!

 Thank you for installing our Shopify App - **“PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App”** on asop-entertainment.myshopify.com

 Our team would like to assist you with the complete app onboarding.

 We request you let us know a suitable time for the onboarding session, which will not take more than 10 mins. Feel free to reply to this email (or) share your contact number, we will get in touch with you.

 You can also refer our documentation to set up the app and start shipping - click here to know more

 Looking forward to hearing from you.

 Thanks and Regards,
 Team PluginHive
https://www.pluginhive.com/about/#team

comments.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your message.

I am available today at **4:00 PM CET** and would be happy to proceed with the onboarding call at that time. Please let me know if this works for your team, and feel free to send through any meeting details.

I look forward to your confirmation.

Kind regards,

LOUIS XVI Team

comments.body:
Hello Thomas,

Good day!

This is Sibi, from the PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label App. Thank you for installing our solution.

Currently, we have other pre-scheduled calls at 4 pm CET today.

You can also book a slot for the call according to your availability using this link - **[****Click Here****]**

Thank you, and we look forward to your response.

Best regards,
Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Sibi,

Thank you for your message.

I have scheduled the onboarding call for tomorrow at **10:15 AM CET**.

Ahead of the session, I wanted to briefly share two issues I am currently facing so we can address them efficiently during the call:

1. **Order Page Integration Issue**
On the Shopify order page, when I click on “More actions”, the option to fulfill or create a shipment using your app is not visible. This is one of the main reasons we installed the app, so it would be great to resolve this.
2. **FedEx Setup Issues**

- The **pickup time and company close time fields are highlighted in red**, even though these are the exact times we have been using with FedEx for over a year.
- Additionally, for **package dimensions**, the values shown in the screenshot are correct, but the system does not accept any value below 20.

I have attached screenshots for reference.

Looking forward to resolving these points during the onboarding call.

Best regards

LOUIS XVI Team
comments.html_body:
Hello Sibi,

Thank you for your message.

I have scheduled the onboarding call for tomorrow at 10:15 AM CET.

Ahead of the session, I wanted to briefly share two issues I am currently facing so we can address them efficiently during the call:

  1. Order Page Integration Issue
    On the Shopify order page, when I click on “More actions”, the option to fulfill or create a shipment using your app is not visible. This is one of the main reasons we installed the app, so it would be great to resolve this.
  2. FedEx Setup Issues
  • The pickup time and company close time fields are highlighted in red, even though these are the exact times we have been using with FedEx for over a year.
  • Additionally, for package dimensions, the values shown in the screenshot are correct, but the system does not accept any value below 20.

I have attached screenshots for reference.

Looking forward to resolving these points during the onboarding call.


Best regards

LOUIS XVI Team
comments.plain_body:

On the Shopify order page, when I click on “More actions”, the option to fulfill or create a shipment using your app is not visible. This is one of the main reasons we installed the app, so it would be great to resolve this.  FedEx Setup Issues    The pickup time and company close time fields are highlighted in red, even though these are the exact times we have been using with FedEx for over a year.  Additionally, for package dimensions, the values shown in the screenshot are correct, but the system does not accept any value below 20.   I have attached screenshots for reference.  Looking forward to resolving these points during the onboarding call.  
  Best regards LOUIS XVI Team

comments.body:

Thank you for booking the slot and also sharing your queries.

We can discuss this over the call which is scheduled for 10.15 am Zurich time tomorrow.

We will be sharing the meeting link 5 minutes prior to the scheduled time.

Looking forward to our meeting.

Regards,

Sibi Firoz
Team PluginHive
